message:
fix: resolve mobile crash caused by closeMobileSidebar render loop (#5629)

The Sidebar useEffect at line 72-77 included closeMobileSidebar in its
dependency array. Since closeMobileSidebar is a new function reference
on every render (not wrapped in useCallback), this caused an infinite
loop on mobile: effect fires → closeMobileSidebar() → notifyListeners
→ re-render → new function ref → effect fires again → React error #185.

Fix: remove closeMobileSidebar from deps. The function's behavior is
stable (always sets isMobileOpen to false), so excluding it is safe.

Verified with Playwright mobile viewport test (iPhone 14, 393x852).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
